---
title: "Cornelius Holler"
about:
  template: marquee
  image: /Attachments/Pictures/Muenster_Poster_Holler.jpg
---

I am a postdoctoral researcher in the department of sports pedagogy at Saarland University. I completed my doctoral degree at the University of Heidelberg in January 2026. My research focuses on peer relationships (using social network analysis), self-concept and physical ability in physical education.

You can find my CV [here](CV.qmd) as well as ongoing and finished [projects](projects.qmd) and [publications](publications.qmd).

## Contact

Dr. Cornelius Holler (he/him)

Institute of Sports Sciences\
Saarland University\
Campus, Geb. B8 1\
66123 Saarbrücken\
DE - Germany

[cornelius.holler\@uni-saarland.de](mailto:cornelius.holler@uni-saarland.de)

## Weblinks

![](Attachments/Pictures/SWI_Logo.jpg){width="24"} [Saarland University](https://www.uni-saarland.de/fachrichtung/sportwissenschaft/institut/mitarbeitende/holler-cornelius-med.html){target="_blank"}

{{< iconify academicons google-scholar size=xl >}} [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=de&user=QUCCKq0AAAAJ){target="_blank"}

{{< ai researchgate size=xl >}} [Researchgate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Cornelius_Holler){target="_blank"}

{{< ai orcid size=xl >}} [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0008-6599-8971){target="_blank"}

{{< iconify logos bluesky size=xl >}} [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/corneliusholler.de){target="_blank"}

{{< iconify devicon linkedin size=xl >}} [LinkedIn](#0){target="_blank"}
